shopping_163.POSSIBLE REASONS FOR FAILURE: The agent failed to accurately match the visual objective. The objective image clearly shows a potted cactus, but the agent added "Shop Succulents | Assorted Collection of Live Air Plants" to the wish list. Air plants are distinct from potted cacti, indicating a lack of precise visual identification or an insufficient search for a closer match.
shopping_163.REFLECTION: When an objective includes an image, prioritize finding a product that closely matches the visual details (e.g., "potted cactus" instead of just "succulents" or "air plants"). If a direct match isn't immediately visible in a category, use the search bar with more specific keywords derived from the image description.
